title: Tea/Coffee/Sugar/Bread Box/Tea Tin, Red/Black/Cream or Glossy Silver, High Quality, with Lid red
description: Set of 3, Stainless Steel, Colour And Chrome Finish. For Tea/Coffee/Sugar. This set of three retro stainless steel containers are made of steel and are an excellent solution for storing tea, coffee and sugar. These storage jars are perfect for adding a splash of colour in your kitchen, available in four different colours. Please choose the required colour using the drop down menu above. Size: (WxH) 10 x 15 cm, available in chrome/black and red/white. Height: 15.00 X 10.00 cm.
